title: Deteccion de anomalias con SQL
description: Tecnicas para detectar outliers, valores atipicos y anomalias usando percentiles, desviacion estandar y comparaciones.
content:
Patrones SQL para detectar anomalias en los datos:

**Metodo 1: Desviacion estandar (Z-Score):**
```sql
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(valor) as media, STDEV(valor) as desviacion
  FROM tabla
)
SELECT t.*, (t.valor - s.media) / NULLIF(s.desviacion, 0) as z_score
FROM tabla t CROSS JOIN stats s
WHERE ABS((t.valor - s.media) / NULLIF(s.desviacion, 0)) > 2  -- mas de 2 desviaciones
```

**Metodo 2: Percentiles (IQR):**
```sql
WITH percentiles AS (
  SELECT 
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY valor) OVER() as q1,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY valor) OVER() as q3
  FROM tabla
)
SELECT t.*
FROM tabla t CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT q1, q3 FROM percentiles) p
WHERE t.valor < p.q1 - 1.5 * (p.q3 - p.q1)
   OR t.valor > p.q3 + 1.5 * (p.q3 - p.q1)
```

**Metodo 3: Comparacion con tendencia:**
```sql
SELECT fecha, valor,
  AVG(valor) OVER (ORDER BY fecha ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) as media_historica,
  valor - AVG(valor) OVER (ORDER BY fecha ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) as desviacion
FROM datos
ORDER BY ABS(valor - AVG(valor) OVER (ORDER BY fecha ROWS BETWEEN 30 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING)) DESC
```

**Anomalias por ausencia de datos:**
```sql
-- Detectar dias sin ventas usando tabla de calendario
SELECT c.fecha
FROM Calendario c
LEFT JOIN Sales s ON c.fecha = CAST(s.fecha as DATE)
WHERE s.id IS NULL AND c.fecha BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND GETDATE()
```
